title: Remich、Remich Canton — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Remich、Remich Cantonの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

RemichはRemich Cantonにある人口3,800の都市です。A picturesque wine town on the Moselle River, known as the pearl of Luxembourg’s wine region, with scenic riverfront promenades and excellent Riesling vineyards.

Last updated: July 12, 2026
